case_title: PIYASSA INC./REP AYKUT AKCAOUGLU et al VS ROUGE NIGHT CLUB INC./REP KEVIN KOKOSZKA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PIYASSA INC./REP AYKUT AKCAOUGLU MOYA, MATTHIEU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUGE NIGHT CLUB INC./REP KEVIN KOKOSZKA NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROUGE NIGHT CLUB INC./REP KEVIN KOKOSZKA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PIYASSA INC./REP AYKUT AKCAOUGLU MOYA, MATTHIEU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-16-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-30-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 I WILL BE OUT OF TOWN FOR APRROX. A WEEK OFTHE HEA RING(INCLUDING POSSIBLY THE DAY OF THE HEARING)AND FURTHERMORE, NEED TO ENSURE THAT I HAVE ADEQUATE TIME TO PREPARE A DEFENSE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PIYASSA INC./REP AYKUT AKCAOUGLU MOYA, MATTHIEU AS TO DEFENDANT ROUGE NIGHT CLUB INC./REP KEVIN KOKOSZKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROUGE NIGHT CLUB INC./REP KEVIN KOKOSZKA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-30-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-28-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
